title: Heleiotis scandens
taxonomy: Heleiotis scandens is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Hymenostegia, but some sources place it under the family Stemonuraceae. However, the most widely accepted classification is that Heleiotis scandens belongs to the family Stemonuraceae. The genus Stemonurus is sometimes used to group Heleiotis scandens. This plant is native to New Caledonia. More research is needed to confirm its exact classification.

intro: Heleiotropium scandens, commonly known as Heleiotis scandens, is a flowering plant native to Australia, belonging to the bignoniaceae family.
